name: Box Jump
instructions:
1. Stand facing box
2. Swing arms and jump onto box
3. Land softly with both feet
4. Stand up, step down
tips: Land softly. Step down, don't jump down.

name: Depth Jump
instructions:
1. Step off box (don't jump)
2. Land on both feet
3. Immediately jump up as high as possible
4. Minimize ground contact time
tips: Advanced plyometric. Fast ground contact is key.

name: Broad Jump
instructions:
1. Stand with feet shoulder-width
2. Swing arms, load hips
3. Jump forward as far as possible
4. Land on both feet, absorb
tips: Drive arms forward. Extend hips fully.

name: Tuck Jump
instructions:
1. Jump straight up
2. Tuck knees to chest at top
3. Extend legs for landing
4. Land softly, repeat immediately
tips: Quick transition between reps. Soft landings.

name: Squat Jump
instructions:
1. Squat down to parallel
2. Explode upward
3. Land softly
4. Reset and repeat
tips: Arms swing up for momentum. Quiet landings.

name: Lunge Jump
instructions:
1. Start in lunge position
2. Jump up and switch legs
3. Land in opposite lunge
4. Repeat alternating
tips: Maintain balance. Drive through front heel.

name: Skater Jump
instructions:
1. Stand on one foot
2. Jump laterally to other foot
3. Land on outside foot
4. Immediately jump back
tips: Stay low. Reach behind with trailing leg for balance.

name: Lateral Bound
instructions:
1. Stand on one leg
2. Bound laterally as far as possible
3. Land on opposite foot
4. Stick the landing, then bound back
tips: Power from the hips. Stick each landing before next jump.

name: Single-Leg Hop
instructions:
1. Stand on one leg
2. Hop forward
3. Land on same foot
4. Continue hopping
tips: Maintain balance. Great for ankle stability.

name: Bounding
instructions:
1. Exaggerated running stride
2. Drive knee high on each step
3. Maximize distance per stride
4. Spend time in air
tips: Think running but bigger. Explosive triple extension each stride.

name: Medicine Ball Slam
instructions:
1. Hold ball overhead
2. Slam it down with full force
3. Catch on bounce or pick up
4. Repeat with intensity
tips: Full body power. Great for stress relief too.

name: Medicine Ball Chest Pass
instructions:
1. Hold ball at chest
2. Push throw against wall or to partner
3. Catch and absorb
4. Immediately throw again
tips: Explosive push. Develops upper body power.

name: Medicine Ball Rotational Throw
instructions:
1. Stand sideways to wall
2. Rotate and throw ball at wall
3. Catch on rebound
4. Rotate back and throw again
tips: Power from hips. Great for rotational athletes.

name: Clap Push-Up
instructions:
1. Push-up position
2. Lower chest to floor
3. Push up explosively, hands leave ground
4. Clap and land softly
tips: Upper body plyometric. Build up from regular push-ups.

name: Box Jump Step-Down
instructions:
1. Jump onto box
2. Stand fully upright
3. Step down one foot at a time
4. Reset and jump again
tips: Safer than rebounding off box. Focus on explosive jump up.

name: Lateral Box Jump
instructions:
1. Stand beside box
2. Jump sideways onto box
3. Land softly
4. Step down, repeat
tips: Develops lateral power. Important for cutting sports.

name: Hurdle Jump
instructions:
1. Line up 3-5 small hurdles
2. Jump over each with both feet
3. Minimize ground contact
4. Quick, reactive jumps
tips: Keep jumps reactive. Spend minimal time on ground.

name: Plyo Push-Up
instructions:
1. Push-up position
2. Lower to floor
3. Push up explosively (hands lift off)
4. Land softly, repeat
tips: No clap needed. Focus on explosiveness.

name: Ankle Hop
instructions:
1. Stand tall, feet together
2. Small rapid hops using only ankles
3. Knees stay nearly straight
4. Quick ground contacts
tips: Stiff ankles. Develops calf reactivity.

name: Drop Squat
instructions:
1. Stand tall
2. Quickly drop into squat position
3. Absorb the landing
4. Stand back up, repeat
tips: Teaches deceleration. Quick drop, stable catch.

name: Close Control Dribbling
instructions:
1. Dribble ball in tight space
2. Use all surfaces of foot
3. Keep ball within 1 meter
4. Use inside, outside, sole
tips: Head up as much as possible. Soft touches.

name: Speed Dribbling
instructions:
1. Set up cones 30m apart
2. Dribble at speed between cones
3. Longer touches at speed
4. Push ball ahead and chase
tips: Touch ball every 2-3 strides. Use laces to push forward.

name: Cone Dribbling
instructions:
1. Set up cones in line 2m apart
2. Weave through cones with ball
3. Use inside and outside of foot
4. Alternate feet
tips: Close ball control. Speed up as skill improves.

name: Short Passing
instructions:
1. Face partner 10-15m away
2. Pass with inside of foot
3. Receive and control
4. One or two touch passing
tips: Lock ankle on contact. Follow through toward target.

name: Long Passing
instructions:
1. Face partner 30-40m away
2. Strike through bottom half of ball
3. Follow through with laces
4. Aim for partner's chest
tips: Plant foot beside ball. Lean back slightly for height.

name: Crossing
instructions:
1. Dribble wide toward byline
2. Look up to assess targets
3. Strike ball with inside or instep
4. Aim for target zone
tips: Look up before crossing. Vary delivery height and pace.

name: Power Shooting
instructions:
1. Approach ball at angle
2. Plant foot beside ball
3. Strike with laces through center
4. Follow through fully
tips: Lock ankle. Hit through the ball, not under it.

name: Placement Shooting
instructions:
1. Approach ball
2. Strike with inside of foot
3. Aim for corners of goal
4. Focus on accuracy over power
tips: Pick your spot before shooting. Placement beats power.

name: Volley
instructions:
1. Ball tossed in air
2. Adjust body position
3. Strike ball before it bounces
4. Keep body over the ball
tips: Timing is everything. Keep eyes on ball at contact.

name: Header
instructions:
1. Ball tossed toward you
2. Attack ball with forehead
3. Eyes open, mouth closed
4. Direct ball with neck muscles
tips: Use forehead, not top of head. Attack the ball.

name: First Touch Control
instructions:
1. Partner throws ball at different heights
2. Control with foot, thigh, or chest
3. Cushion the ball on contact
4. Prepare for next action
tips: Soft touch. Move body to meet the ball.

name: Juggling
instructions:
1. Drop ball to foot
2. Tap up using laces
3. Alternate feet
4. Use thighs and head too
tips: Soft touches. Keep ball below waist height.

name: 1v1 Moves
instructions:
1. Dribble toward cone (defender)
2. Perform skill move
3. Accelerate past cone
4. Practice step-overs, feints, cuts
tips: Sell the fake. Change of pace after the move.

name: Step-Over
instructions:
1. Approach ball at pace
2. Circle foot over ball inside-to-outside
3. Push ball away with opposite foot
4. Accelerate into space
tips: Exaggerate body movement. Speed up with practice.

name: Cruyff Turn
instructions:
1. Shape to pass or shoot
2. Instead, drag ball behind standing leg
3. Turn 180 degrees
4. Accelerate away
tips: Sell the fake pass. Quick turn and burst.

name: Elastico
instructions:
1. Push ball with outside of foot
2. Quickly snap to inside of same foot
3. Change direction
4. Accelerate away
tips: All in the ankle flick. Very quick motion.

name: Wall Passing Drill
instructions:
1. Stand 5m from wall
2. Pass ball against wall
3. Control return
4. Vary distance and surfaces
tips: Both feet. Two-touch then one-touch.

name: Rondo (Keep-Away)
instructions:
1. Form circle with defenders in middle
2. Keep possession with quick passing
3. One or two touch
4. Rotate defenders on loss
tips: Barcelona's favorite drill. Quick decisions, body positioning.

name: Through Ball Practice
instructions:
1. Set up target gates with cones
2. Weight the pass to lead runner
3. Play ball into space
4. Vary weight and angle
tips: Read the runner's pace. Ball should arrive ahead of them.

name: Hamstring Stretch
instructions:
1. Sit with one leg extended
2. Bend other leg, foot to inner thigh
3. Reach toward extended foot
4. Hold stretch
tips: Don't bounce. Breathe into the stretch.

name: Quad Stretch
instructions:
1. Stand on one leg
2. Pull opposite heel to glute
3. Keep knees together
4. Hold, feeling quad stretch
tips: Hold wall for balance if needed. Keep hips square.

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions:
1. Half-kneeling position
2. Front knee at 90 degrees
3. Push hips forward
4. Feel stretch in rear hip
tips: Squeeze rear glute. Keep torso upright.

name: Calf Stretch
instructions:
1. Place hands on wall
2. Step one foot back
3. Keep back heel on ground
4. Lean forward into stretch
tips: Straight leg targets gastrocnemius. Bent knee targets soleus.

name: Shoulder Stretch
instructions:
1. Bring arm across chest
2. Use other arm to pull it close
3. Feel stretch in rear shoulder
4. Hold, switch sides
tips: Don't shrug shoulder up. Pull at the elbow.

name: Chest Stretch
instructions:
1. Place arm on doorframe at 90 degrees
2. Step forward through door
3. Feel stretch in chest
4. Hold, switch sides
tips: Vary arm height to target different chest fibers.

name: Lat Stretch
instructions:
1. Reach arm overhead
2. Lean to opposite side
3. Feel stretch along side
4. Hold, switch sides
tips: Breathe deeply into the stretch. Gentle, sustained hold.

name: Pigeon Pose
instructions:
1. Front leg bent, knee out to side
2. Back leg extended behind
3. Sink hips toward floor
4. Hold, feeling deep glute stretch
tips: Excellent hip opener. Use padding under hip if tight.

name: Downward Dog
instructions:
1. Hands and feet on ground
2. Lift hips high, form inverted V
3. Press heels toward floor
4. Straighten arms and back
tips: Pedal feet to deepen stretch. Push chest toward thighs.

name: Child's Pose
instructions:
1. Kneel, sit back on heels
2. Reach arms forward on ground
3. Rest forehead on floor
4. Breathe deeply, relax
tips: Relaxation pose. Spread knees wider for deeper stretch.

name: Cat-Cow
instructions:
1. On hands and knees
2. Cat: round back up, tuck chin
3. Cow: arch back, look up
4. Flow between positions
tips: Coordinate with breathing. Inhale cow, exhale cat.

name: IT Band Stretch
instructions:
1. Cross one leg behind the other
2. Lean toward the front leg side
3. Reach overhead with same arm
4. Feel stretch along outer hip/thigh
tips: Common tight area for runners. Gentle, sustained stretch.

name: Figure-4 Stretch
instructions:
1. Lie on back
2. Cross one ankle over opposite knee
3. Pull bottom leg toward chest
4. Feel deep glute stretch
tips: Great for sciatic relief. Keep head on ground.

name: Seated Forward Fold
instructions:
1. Sit with legs extended
2. Hinge at hips, reach for toes
3. Keep back straight initially
4. Fold forward, hold
tips: Don't round excessively. Lead with chest.

name: Butterfly Stretch
instructions:
1. Sit, soles of feet together
2. Knees out to sides
3. Gently press knees down
4. Lean forward for deeper stretch
tips: Use elbows to gently press knees. Don't bounce.

name: Scorpion Stretch
instructions:
1. Lie face down, arms out to sides
2. Lift one leg, reach across body
3. Rotate toward opposite hand
4. Return and switch sides
tips: Dynamic mobility. Great for thoracic rotation.

name: World's Greatest Stretch
instructions:
1. Lunge forward, hands on ground
2. Rotate torso, reach arm up
3. Return hand to ground
4. Straighten front leg for hamstring stretch
tips: The ultimate warm-up stretch. Hits everything.

name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
instructions:
1. Sit with front leg at 90 degrees
2. Back leg at 90 degrees behind
3. Sit tall over front shin
4. Feel deep hip stretch
tips: Great for hip mobility. Both internal and external rotation.

name: Neck Stretch
instructions:
1. Tilt head to one side
2. Gently assist with hand
3. Feel stretch along opposite side
4. Hold, switch sides
tips: Gentle pressure only. Never force the neck.

name: Wrist Stretch
instructions:
1. Extend arm, palm up
2. Pull fingers back with other hand
3. Hold stretch
4. Switch to palm down
tips: Important if you lift heavy. Both directions.

name: Thoracic Spine Rotation
instructions:
1. On hands and knees or side-lying
2. Place hand behind head
3. Rotate torso to open up
4. Return and repeat
tips: Critical for overhead movements. Isolate thoracic rotation.

name: Standing Hamstring Stretch
instructions:
1. Place heel on raised surface
2. Keep leg straight
3. Hinge at hips toward foot
4. Hold stretch
tips: Keep back straight. Feel stretch behind knee.

name: Tricep Stretch
instructions:
1. Reach one arm overhead
2. Bend elbow, hand behind head
3. Pull elbow with other hand
4. Feel stretch in tricep
tips: Gentle pull. Hold for 20 seconds each side.

name: Foam Roll Quadriceps
instructions:
1. Lie face down, roller under quads
2. Roll from hip to knee
3. Pause on tender spots
4. Spend 30 seconds per leg
tips: Avoid rolling directly on knee joint. Use body weight to control pressure.

name: Foam Roll Hamstrings
instructions:
1. Sit with roller under hamstrings
2. Roll from glutes to above knee
3. Cross one leg over the other for more pressure
4. Pause on sore spots
tips: Stack legs for more pressure. Slow rolls.

name: Foam Roll IT Band
instructions:
1. Lie on side, roller under outer thigh
2. Roll from hip to above knee
3. Pause on tender areas
4. Control pressure with hands
tips: Can be uncomfortable. Breathe through it.

name: Foam Roll Calves
instructions:
1. Sit with roller under calves
2. Roll from ankle to below knee
3. Rotate leg in/out to hit all angles
4. Cross legs for more pressure
tips: Rotate foot to hit medial and lateral heads.

name: Foam Roll Upper Back
instructions:
1. Lie on roller, positioned at upper back
2. Cross arms over chest
3. Roll from mid-back to upper back
4. Extend over roller for thoracic mobility
tips: Extend back over roller for spine mobility. Don't roll lower back.

name: Foam Roll Glutes
instructions:
1. Sit on roller, cross one ankle over knee
2. Lean toward crossed leg side
3. Roll over glute area
4. Pause on tender spots
tips: Cross-leg position targets piriformis. Great for hip pain.

name: Lacrosse Ball Foot Release
instructions:
1. Stand with ball under foot
2. Roll from heel to toes
3. Apply pressure to arch
4. Spend extra time on tender spots
tips: Great for plantar fasciitis. Do morning and evening.

name: Lacrosse Ball Shoulder Release
instructions:
1. Place ball between shoulder and wall
2. Roll around shoulder blade area
3. Pause on tight spots
4. Move arm to access deeper tissue
tips: Don't press too hard. Breathe and relax into it.

name: Cool-Down Walk
instructions:
1. Walk at easy pace
2. Gradually slow heart rate
3. Breathe deeply
4. Shake out limbs
tips: Essential after intense training. 5-10 minutes minimum.

name: Diaphragmatic Breathing
instructions:
1. Lie on back, hand on belly
2. Inhale through nose 4 seconds
3. Feel belly rise
4. Exhale through mouth 6 seconds
tips: Activates parasympathetic system. Great for post-workout recovery.

name: Progressive Muscle Relaxation
instructions:
1. Lie down, close eyes
2. Tense each muscle group 5 seconds
3. Release and notice relaxation
4. Progress from toes to head
tips: Great for recovery and sleep. Full body tension release.

name: Static Stretching Routine
instructions:
1. Hold each stretch 30 seconds
2. Hit all major muscle groups
3. Hamstrings, quads, calves, hips, shoulders
4. Deep breathing throughout
tips: Best done post-workout when muscles are warm.

name: Contrast Shower
instructions:
1. Hot water for 3 minutes
2. Cold water for 1 minute
3. Repeat 3 times
4. End on cold
tips: Promotes blood flow. Reduces muscle soreness.

name: Turkish Get-Up
instructions:
1. Lie down, press kettlebell overhead
2. Roll to elbow, then hand
3. Bridge hips up
4. Sweep leg through to kneel, then stand
tips: Master without weight first. Keep eyes on the weight.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions:
1. Feet shoulder-width, kettlebell between feet
2. Hinge at hips, grip with both hands
3. Snap hips forward to swing bell up
4. Control the backswing
tips: Hip hinge, not squat. Power from hips.

name: Kettlebell Clean and Press
instructions:
1. Clean kettlebell to rack position
2. Press overhead
3. Lower to rack
4. Drop back to swing position
tips: Clean should be smooth, not bang wrist. Full lockout on press.

name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
instructions:
1. Hold kettlebell at chest
2. Squat down between knees
3. Drive up through heels
4. Keep torso upright
tips: Elbows inside knees at bottom. Natural squat position.

name: Battle Ropes
instructions:
1. Grip rope ends, athletic stance
2. Alternate arms creating waves
3. Maintain intensity
4. Keep core tight
tips: Hinge at hips slightly. Breathe rhythmically.

name: Sled Push
instructions:
1. Grip sled handles, lean forward
2. Drive with legs
3. Push for set distance
4. Short, powerful steps
tips: 45-degree lean angle. Drive through the balls of feet.

name: Wall Ball
instructions:
1. Hold ball at chest, face wall
2. Squat down
3. Drive up and throw ball to target on wall
4. Catch and repeat
tips: Seamless squat to throw. Full hip extension.

name: Thruster
instructions:
1. Front squat position
2. Squat down
3. Drive up and press overhead
4. Lower bar to shoulders, repeat
tips: Use squat momentum to drive the press. Efficient movement.

name: Man Maker
instructions:
1. Push-up with dumbbells
2. Row each dumbbell
3. Jump feet to hands
4. Clean and press dumbbells overhead
tips: Total body killer. Scale weight appropriately.

name: Burpee
instructions:
1. Drop to push-up position
2. Perform push-up
3. Jump feet to hands
4. Jump up with arms overhead
tips: Dreaded but effective. Maintain form as you fatigue.

name: Bear Crawl
instructions:
1. On hands and feet, knees hovering
2. Crawl forward, opposite hand and foot
3. Keep hips low
4. Move forward and backward
tips: Knees 1 inch off ground. Great full-body conditioning.

name: Crab Walk
instructions:
1. Sit, hands behind, feet flat
2. Lift hips off ground
3. Walk forward using hands and feet
4. Keep hips up throughout
tips: Great for shoulder mobility and glute activation.

name: Kettlebell Snatch
instructions:
1. Swing kettlebell between legs
2. Drive hips to propel bell up
3. Punch through at top
4. Lock out overhead
tips: Pull bell close to body. Smooth turnover at top.

name: Sandbag Clean
instructions:
1. Squat down, grip sandbag
2. Drive up explosively
3. Pull bag to chest/shoulder
4. Absorb and stand tall
tips: Awkward object training. Builds real-world strength.

name: Tire Flip
instructions:
1. Squat down, hands under tire
2. Drive up with legs
3. When tire is at hip height, push forward
4. Follow through to flip
tips: Drive with legs, not back. Explosive hip extension.

name: Rope Climb
instructions:
1. Grip rope above head
2. Lock rope with feet
3. Pull up while standing on rope
4. Re-grip higher, repeat
tips: Use feet to lock. J-hook or S-wrap foot technique.

name: Kettlebell Windmill
instructions:
1. Press kettlebell overhead
2. Feet angled away from bell
3. Hinge at hip, reach to floor
4. Return to standing, arm stays up
tips: Keep eyes on the weight. Flexibility and strength combined.

name: Box Step-Up with Press
instructions:
1. Hold dumbbells at shoulders
2. Step up onto box
3. Press dumbbells overhead at top
4. Step down, repeat
tips: Full body coordination. Drive through front heel.

name: Renegade Row
instructions:
1. Plank position on dumbbells
2. Row one dumbbell to hip
3. Lower with control
4. Alternate sides
tips: Wide stance for stability. Anti-rotation core work.

name: Power Clean
instructions:
1. Bar on floor, deadlift position
2. First pull to knees
3. Explosive second pull with hip extension
4. Catch in front rack position
tips: Olympic lift — learn from a coach. Explosive triple extension.

name: Hang Clean
instructions:
1. Start with bar at hang position (mid-thigh)
2. Dip and drive hips forward
3. Pull bar up, rotate elbows under
4. Catch in front rack
tips: Simpler entry to Olympic lifting. Fast elbows.

name: Push Press
instructions:
1. Bar in front rack position
2. Quick dip with knees
3. Drive up, pressing bar overhead
4. Lock out at top
tips: Use leg drive. More weight than strict press.

name: Sled Pull
instructions:
1. Face sled, grip rope
2. Lean back, pull rope hand over hand
3. Pull sled toward you
4. Walk back and repeat
tips: Low body position. Pull through with whole body.

name: Plate Carry Overhead
instructions:
1. Press plate overhead with both hands
2. Lock arms out
3. Walk with plate overhead
4. Keep core tight, ribs down
tips: Shoulder stability challenge. Don't arch lower back.

name: Medicine Ball Overhead Slam
instructions:
1. Lift ball overhead, extend body
2. Slam ball down with force
3. Squat to pick up
4. Repeat with intensity
tips: Use a dead ball (no bounce) for slams. Full body power.

name: Crawl to Sprint
instructions:
1. Bear crawl for 10m
2. Transition to standing
3. Sprint 20m
4. Walk back and repeat
tips: Multi-movement conditioning. Quick transition between crawl and sprint.
